===Pokémon Generations===
[[File:Diantha PG.png|thumb|250px|Diantha in [[Pokémon Generations]]]]
In ''[[PG16|The Beauty Eternal]]'', Diantha was talking to [[Lysandre]] in Café Soleil in [[Lumiose City]].

In ''[[PG18|The Redemption]]'', she was onstage with {{an|Professor Sycamore}} and {{ga|Calem}} at the parade, celebrating the latter's achievement of becoming the new [[Kalos League]] {{pkmn|Champion}}.
